DYL.note: Uranium sector leader surges on Australia-India supply deal (Jul 10) — the largest new buyer market entering. DYL is the highest-beta pure-play uranium develope
DYL.name: Deep Yellow Ltd
DYL.narrative: Uranium sector leader surges on Australia-India supply deal (Jul 10) — the largest new buyer market entering. DYL is the highest-beta pure-play uranium developer on ASX. Sector momentum typically runs 2-3 sessions post policy deal. LOT returning from halt Jul 16 creates urgency: enter DYL before the noise.

PDN.note: Paladin is ASX's largest listed uranium producer (Langer Heinrich mine, Namibia, in production). The Australia-India deal (Jul 10) adds 1.4B potential buyers to
PDN.name: Paladin Energy Ltd
PDN.narrative: Paladin is ASX's largest listed uranium producer (Langer Heinrich mine, Namibia, in production). The Australia-India deal (Jul 10) adds 1.4B potential buyers to an already supply-constrained market. Better institutional liquidity than DYL — ideal for a 2-10 day hold. Street: 4 Buys. Uranium spot $85-87/lb vs ~$55-60 break-even = strong margins.

BOE.note: Boss Energy's Honeymoon ISR uranium project (South Australia) generates ~$25/lb margin at current $85-87/lb spot. Macquarie upgraded to Outperform, $1.75 target
BOE.name: Boss Energy Ltd
BOE.narrative: Boss Energy's Honeymoon ISR uranium project (South Australia) generates ~$25/lb margin at current $85-87/lb spot. Macquarie upgraded to Outperform, $1.75 target, citing well field confidence. Short interest falling -1.61% = bears covering. Australia-India deal Jul10 expands medium-term buyer pool. 52w high A$3.92 suggests material recovery potential.

COIN.name: Coinbase Global
COIN.narrative: Coinbase +6.7% this week. BTC stable ~$60K — crypto market recovering. Finnhub analyst consensus: 11 StrongBuy + 19 Buy (68% bullish) vs 11 Hold + 3 Sell. Highest-liquidity pure-play crypto exchange on NASDAQ. US market opens Mon 14 Jul 09:30 ET — pre-market set-up is key for follow-through.

VLO.note: Valero is the world's largest independent refiner. Hormuz effectively closed (US-Iran conflict Jul10 re-escalation) → crude differentials surge → crack spreads
VLO.name: Valero Energy Corporation
VLO.narrative: Valero is the world's largest independent refiner. Hormuz effectively closed (US-Iran conflict Jul10 re-escalation) → crude differentials surge → crack spreads at multi-year highs → direct refiner margin expansion. Multiple analysts raced to raise targets Jul13 (StocksToTrade). Structural trade: crack spread squeeze persists as long as Hormuz remains disrupted.

TEAM.name: Atlassian Corporation
TEAM.narrative: Atlassian Q4 FY2026 beat drove a street-wide target reset mid-July. Yahoo Finance: "Atlassian and Shopify Shares Are Soaring" (Jul 2026). StockStory: "Atlassian Stock Grinds Higher As Street Resets Targets" (Jul 13). AI-enhanced features (Atlassian Intelligence) driving enterprise upsell and pricing power upgrades. Australian HQ = AUD/USD tailwind if USD softens.
